comments.body:
**🟠 [HIGH] Missing null check on token**

load_token() returns None when the cookie is absent; the next line dereferences it and raises AttributeError.

**🟡 [MEDIUM] Password hashed twice**

hash_password() runs here and again in save(); the double hash makes the stored value fail verification.

**🔴 [CRITICAL] SQL injection via f-string**

The user-supplied uid is interpolated straight into the SQL string.

```suggestion
cursor.execute("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = %s", (uid,))
```
